refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time by optimizing load, travel, and dump phases to meet the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-FRs for each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows targeted design and verification of each phase's contribution to overall cycle time.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for each phase and overall cycle under agreed duty cycle and site conditions; verify total cycle time meets CT_target.
sub_frs: Minimize load phase time to meet partial cycle time target
Minimize travel phase time to meet partial cycle time target
Minimize dump phase time to meet partial cycle time target

candidate_dps: Optimize hydraulic system and bucket control for load phase
Implement efficient path planning and vehicle speed control for travel phase
Automate dump mechanism and positioning for dump phase
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize hydraulic system and bucket control for load phase

potential_sources: Load phase optimization affects travel start conditions
Travel phase speed affects dump timing
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by phase but require interface coordination; chosen DP focuses on load phase optimization as first step.

assumptions_risks: Load phase optimization will not degrade safety or cause operational conflicts
Cycle time improvements in load phase translate to overall cycle time gains
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider decomposing travel and dump phase DPs in subsequent levels to reduce coupling and improve modularity.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components and control systems responsible for hydraulic actuation and bucket control during load phase

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Send load phase status and performance data to NGHE Solution for monitoring

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receive load phase commands and parameters from NGHE Solution or Teleoperation modules

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle module contains primary physical and control elements for load phase; low diffusion risk.
NGHE Solution oversees coordination but does not directly implement load phase control.
Teleoperation may influence commands but not direct control; moderate diffusion risk if control logic duplicated.
Safety Services monitors but does not implement load phase control.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning load phase hydraulic and bucket control DP to Vehicle module centralizes physical actuation and control logic, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules
Risk of duplicated control logic if Teleoperation overrides not well managed
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and ownership boundaries between Vehicle and Teleoperation to avoid control logic duplication.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement into load, travel, dump phases is clear and DP selection for load phase optimization logically satisfies the load phase FR.

diffusion_risks: Possible duplication of control logic between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module scores highest containment and lowest diffusion for load phase DP; assignment is appropriate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and cycle time measurements is feasible with assigned IM and interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear ownership of load phase control within Vehicle module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Further decompose travel and dump phases in next level
Clarify interface protocols between Vehicle and Teleoperation to mitigate diffusion risks

decision.justification: While the load phase DP and IM assignment are sound, the overall cycle time FR requires further decomposition to cover travel and dump phases explicitly. Interface definitions between Vehicle and Teleoperation need refinement to reduce diffusion risk.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize travel phase time to meet partial cycle time target
Minimize dump phase time to meet partial cycle time target

revise.why: To explicitly include travel and dump phases for complete cycle time coverage and enable corresponding DP and IM assignments.

assumptions: Load phase optimization will yield measurable cycle time improvements
Vehicle module can encapsulate load phase control without excessive interface complexity
open_risks: Control logic duplication risk between Vehicle and Teleoperation
Incomplete coverage of cycle time without travel and dump phase FRs
evidence_needed: Cycle time measurements per phase under operational conditions
Interface usage and control command flow analysis between Vehicle and Teleoperation
